name: Agent Knock Knock
description: Controlled delegation from OpenClaw to Claude Code through a structured protocol.

binPath.description: Path to agent-knock-knock CLI. Defaults to this package's bin/agent-knock-knock.js.

workspace.description: Default workspace for delegated Claude Code tasks.

defaultClaudeSession.description: Default Claude Code session name. claudeSession remains supported as a compatibility alias.

codexAllProxy.description: ALL_PROXY value used when launching Codex through ACPX.

codexModel.description: ACPX model id used when launching Codex.

model.description: ACPX model id used when launching coding agents.

allProxy.description: ALL_PROXY value used when launching coding agents through ACPX.

openclawSession.description: Default OpenClaw session label stored in the protocol state.

gatewayUrl.description: Gateway URL used by the legacy CLI callback delivery path.

gatewayToken.description: Gateway token used by the legacy CLI callback delivery path.

openclawBin.description: Path to the OpenClaw CLI used by callback delivery. Defaults to PATH plus common user install locations.

callbackCommand.description: Optional callback command template. {statePath} and {state_path} are replaced with the shell-quoted state path.
